strategy: LH-001 Lifecycle Heuristic — Single-Event Geopolitics Insider Detection
reason: Pooled signal confirmed (p=0.0160, r=0.208). Neither event independently significant (Haley p=0.1087, Iran p=0.4818). V1 Haley p=0.0000 was a market-scale confound — Haley candidates compared against mixed Haley+Iran control, not event-specific control. Claimed p=0.0067 not reproducible. N=2 events in same 12-day window insufficient for cross-event generalisation. Deploy as watchlist trigger only via existing insider_signals infrastructure.

task1_mann_whitney.v1_error: V1 Haley p=0.0000 was confound — Haley lifecycle vs mixed Haley+Iran control, not event-specific

task2_bot_exclusion.exclusion_method: research_excluded=0 AND bot_type IS NULL (traders table)
caveats: Bot exclusion valid — LP_ARTIFACT and ARB_BOT excluded per integration-contract.md
V1 used permissive bot exclusion (bot_type IS NULL only, not research_excluded=0) giving n=128 vs v2 n=59
Either definition is defensible; v2 is more conservative and consistent with research standards

task3_power_analysis.verdict: INSUFFICIENT — events too few and too small for cross-event generalisation

task4_iran_market.include_recommendation: EXCLUDE from primary analysis (data quality: impossible title)
task4_iran_market.exclusion_effect: Weakens result — pooled without Iran gives p=0.1087 (NS). Iran provides directional support, not drag.
task4_iran_market.title_anomaly: Will Iran recognize Iran by June 2025 — self-referential, impossible title
task4_iran_market.elo_clustering_concern: Multiple Iran candidates at ELO 3000.0, 2700.0, 2000.0 — thin-sample artefacts

task5_prospective_applicability.existing_pattern_label: New wallet, large high-price bet, single market focus (Iran-strike pattern)
task5_prospective_applicability.account_creation_date_precision: unclear — verify if Gamma API wallet creation used vs first-trade proxy
task5_prospective_applicability.deployment_recommendation: Use existing insider_signals infrastructure. Do NOT build parallel system. Validate 7 existing records as they resolve.
task5_prospective_applicability.false_positive_concern: 100% win rate in test set because both test markets resolved No. Cannot measure false positive rate from this sample alone.

integration_contract_check.contract_status: CORRECT — join key fixed in v1.3

conditions_for_full_pass: 5+ additional independent geopolitics events with event-specific significance (at least 3/5 must reach p<0.05 event-level)
Iran market title resolved via Gamma API
Insider_signals validation: 5+ resolved records with >=60% accuracy
Confirm account_creation_date precision in insider_signals pipeline
